items.topic_thesis: Severability and reversibility make criticism cheaper and therefore more honest.
items.seed_topic_thesis: Severability and reversibility make criticism cheaper and therefore more honest.
items.angle: Do not summarize the news; diagnose the pattern underneath it.
items.hook: Most people are misreading what this story is actually about. severability and reversibility make criticism cheaper and therefore more honest.

items.topic_thesis: Rectification of Names matters because a leader who cannot call failure failure makes ritual truth-telling a farce.
items.seed_topic_thesis: Rectification of Names matters because a leader who cannot call failure failure makes ritual truth-telling a farce.
items.angle: Start with a recurring problem and end with a usable move.
items.hook: If your team keeps repeating the same failure, stop adding process. rectification of names matters because a leader who cannot call failure failure makes ritual truth-telling a farce.

items.topic_thesis: Knowledge and myth solve different problems, and organizations fail when they confuse them.
items.seed_topic_thesis: Knowledge and myth solve different problems, and organizations fail when they confuse them.
items.angle: Make the pattern recognizable fast and show what drives it.
items.hook: You can tell a team is drifting into theater when knowledge and myth solve different problems, and organizations fail when they confuse them.
